title: Bridge Essay: Fetal brain activity and the free energy principle.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.

**Fetal brain activity and the free energy principle.**. J Perinat Med.. PMID: 37096665. DOI: 10.1515/jpm-2023-0092. OBJECTIVES: To study whether the free energy principle can explain fetal brain activity and the existence of fetal consciousness via achaotic dimension derived using artificial intelligence. METHODS: In this observational study, we used afour-dimensional ultrasound technique obtained to collect images of fetal faces from pregnancies at 27-37 weeks of gestation, between February and December 2021.
